description: Style NoteAdd a pop of colour to your Summer wear wardrobe with this kurta from myntra. Featuring a colourful, all over floral print and made from pure cotton this piece scores high on style as well as comfort. Accessorise it with beaded bracelets and strappy wedge heels for an effortless yet inspired look.Product DetailsOrange, yellow, white and green all over printed kurta, mandarin collar, yoke in front with quarter inch tucks, short puff sleeves with orange band at sleeve hem, vented hemMaterials and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model( height 5'8" and chest 33) is wearing a size M
